basic_details.short_information: The Cotton Corporation of India Limited (CCI) has released a recruitment notification for various posts in 2026. The organisation invites online applications from eligible candidates for Assistant Manager, Management Trainee, Junior Commercial Executive and Junior Assistant posts.

Graduate / Post Graduate / MBA / CA / CMA / Relevant Degree
Cotton Corporation of India Recruitment 2026 Short Notification

content_sections.heading: Important Dates
content_sections.text: Starting Date for Apply Online: 09-07-2026 Last Date for Apply Online: 24-07-2026

content_sections.heading: Cotton Corporation of India Vacancy 2026 - Post Details
content_sections.text: CCI has announced vacancies for various Assistant Manager, Management Trainee and Junior level positions. The post-wise vacancy details are given below:

content_sections.heading: Who Can Apply for Cotton Corporation of India Recruitment 2026?
content_sections.text: Candidates having relevant educational qualifications can apply for different posts. The eligibility details are as follows: Assistant Manager Posts: Candidates with relevant Post Graduation / Engineering / Language qualifications as required for the post. Management Trainee (Marketing): Candidates with MBA / relevant management qualification. Management Trainee (Accounts): Candidates with CA / CMA / relevant Accounts qualification. Junior Commercial Executive: Candidates with required graduation qualification as mentioned in the notification. Junior Assistant Posts: Candidates with relevant graduation qualification.

content_sections.heading: Cotton Corporation of India Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: For Junior Assistant / Management Trainee posts: 18 to 30 years For Assistant Manager posts: 18 to 32 years

content_sections.heading: Cotton Corporation of India Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee
content_sections.text: For General / EWS / OBC Candidates: Rs 1,500 For SC / ST / Ex-Servicemen / PwBD Candidates: Rs 500

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for Cotton Corporation of India Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the official CCI website. Open the Recruitment section. Download and read the official notification carefully. Click on the online application link. Register using your email ID and mobile number. Fill out the application form with correct details. Upload required documents and photographs. Pay the application fee (if applicable). Submit the application form and take a printout for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the name of the organization conducting the CCI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The Cotton Corporation of India Limited (CCI) is conducting the CCI Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in Cotton Corporation of India Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 148 vacancies are available for various posts including Assistant Manager, Management Trainee, Junior Commercial Executive and Junior Assistant.

faq.question: Q3. What are the posts available under CCI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The available posts include Assistant Manager (Official Language), Assistant Manager (Information Technology), Management Trainee (Marketing), Management Trainee (Accounts), Junior Commercial Executive, Junior Assistant (Accounts) and Junior Assistant (General).

faq.question: Q4. What is the starting date to apply online for CCI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application process starts on 09 July 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the last date to apply for Cotton Corporation of India Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form is 24 July 2026.

faq.question: Q6. What is the educational qualification required for CCI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have relevant qualifications such as Graduation, Post Graduation, MBA, CA, CMA, Engineering or other qualifications depending on the post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the age limit for CCI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The age limit will be as per the rules and guidelines mentioned in the official CCI recruitment notification.
